body.text: Post-Memorial Day open: Colorado's 152-page draft list of "Specified Semiautomatic Firearms" under SB25-003 is the major weekend development

Reload contributing writer Jake Fogleman's Sunday member-exclusive shows the May 15 CO DOR draft sweeps in hundreds of AR/AK variants plus hunting rifles (Sauer 303, Mauser M1916), carve-out variants (Browning BAR MK 4, Springfield M1 Scout), an 8-round Walther CCP, and even a Ruger 10/22 variant. NSSF May 18 dealer alert: two-week feedback window before July 1 final guidance; effective August 1, 2026.

body.text:
• Colorado DOR draft list (May 15) sweeps AR/AK + Walther CCP, Ruger 10/22, Desert Eagle
• NSSF May 18 alert: two-week dealer feedback window before July 1 final
• VA four-county prosecutor refusals hold; courts reopen Tue—first scheduling-order eligible day
• ATF Sec. 926A transport NPRM comment day 20 of 90; brace + EITB Week 4 day 2
